args:
Benchmark task: helper-read-write-ledger
Repository: https://github.com/honojs/hono.git

Create a new file at bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md. This is a long, simple read and write task for a small local model. Do not refactor or fix anything. First create the bench-artifacts directory if needed. Then read every file in this exact list before writing: src/helper/factory/index.ts, src/helper/route/index.ts, src/helper/websocket/index.ts, src/helper/cookie/index.ts, src/helper/testing/index.ts, src/helper/adapter/index.ts, src/helper/css/index.ts, src/helper/css/common.ts, src/helper/proxy/index.ts, src/helper/dev/index.ts, src/helper/html/index.ts, src/helper/ssg/index.ts, src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts, src/helper/ssg/utils.ts, src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts, src/helper/streaming/index.ts, src/helper/streaming/stream.ts, src/helper/streaming/sse.ts, src/helper/streaming/text.ts, src/helper/accepts/index.ts, src/helper/accepts/accepts.ts, src/helper/conninfo/index.ts, src/helper/conninfo/types.ts. The output file must start with '# Helper Read/Write Ledger'. For each listed file, add a heading exactly '## <file path>'. Under each heading write four short bullets: '- Main exports or names: ...', '- Reads as: ...', '- Neighbor files: ...', and '- Safe summary: ...'. Use simple wording and cite paths literally. Add a final section '## Simple Index' that repeats all file paths as a checklist. Do not edit source files. In the final answer, include the created file path and verification status.

Constraints:
- Do not ask the user to write prompts or inspect files manually.
- Prefer the smallest safe code change when edits are required.
- Include exact file paths, commands run, and verification status in the final answer.

commands.command: test -f bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md && grep -q '# Helper Read/Write Ledger' bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md && grep -q '## src/helper/factory/index.ts' bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md && grep -q '## src/helper/streaming/sse.ts' bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md

artifacts.content:
# Helper Read/Write Ledger

## src/helper/factory/index.ts
- Main exports or names: `Factory` class, `createFactory`, `createMiddleware`
- Reads as: TypeScript definition file with TypeScript interfaces and type definitions for factory pattern helpers
- Neighbor files: src/hono, src/hono-base, src/types, src/utils
- Safe summary: Provides `createFactory` function that creates a Factory class for initializing Hono apps with custom handlers and default options. Also exports `createMiddleware` wrapper that returns middleware handlers.

## src/helper/route/index.ts
- Main exports or names: `matchedRoutes`, `routePath`, `baseRoutePath`, `basePath`
- Reads as: TypeScript utility functions for route inspection using context
- Neighbor files: src/context, src/request/constants, src/types, src/utils/url
- Safe summary: Provides utilities to inspect matched routes, get route paths, base paths, and compute base paths with embedded parameters cached via WeakMap for performance.

## src/helper/websocket/index.ts
- Main exports or names: `defineWebSocketHelper`, `WSContext`, `WSEvents`, `UpgradeWebSocket`
- Reads as: TypeScript interface and class definitions for WebSocket support
- Neighbor files: src/context, src/types
- Safe summary: Provides `defineWebSocketHelper` to upgrade HTTP connections to WebSocket with event listeners (onOpen, onMessage, onClose, onError) and WSContext for controlling WebSocket operations.

## src/helper/cookie/index.ts
- Main exports or names: `getCookie`, `getSignedCookie`, `generateCookie`, `setCookie`, `setSignedCookie`, `generateSignedCookie`, `deleteCookie`
- Reads as: TypeScript utility functions for cookie reading and writing
- Neighbor files: src/context, src/utils/cookie
- Safe support for __Secure- and __Host- prefixed cookies with secure attribute enforcement.

## src/helper/testing/index.ts
- Main exports or names: `testClient`
- Reads as: TypeScript function to create test client for Hono apps
- Neighbor files: src/client, src/context
- Safe summary: Creates a test client from a Hono app that uses the app's request method as a custom fetch implementation, enabling testing without external network calls.

## src/helper/adapter/index.ts
- Main exports or names: `env`, `getRuntimeKey`, `checkUserAgentEquals`, `knownUserAgents`
- Reads as: TypeScript runtime detection utilities
- Neighbor files: src/context
- Safe summary: Detects runtime environment (node, deno, bun, workerd, fastly, edge-light, other) via user agent strings or global properties and provides typed access to environment bindings.

## src/helper/css/index.ts
- Main exports or names: `createCssContext`, `css`, `cx`, `keyframes`, `viewTransition`, `Style`
- Reads as: TypeScript CSS-in-JS helper with template string support
- Neighbor files: src/helper/html, src/jsx/dom/css, src/utils/html, src/helper/css/common
- Safe summary: Provides CSS-in-JS functions with class name generation, supporting async variables, `cx` for class concatenation, `keyframes` for animations, and `viewTransition` for CSS transitions.

## src/helper/css/common.ts
- Main exports or names: `cssCommon`, `cxCommon`, `keyframesCommon`, `viewTransitionCommon`, `minify`, `rawCssString`, `toHash`, `buildStyleString`
- Reads as: TypeScript CSS utility functions for style building
- Neighbor files: src/helper/css/index
- Safe summary: Core CSS building utilities including class name hashing, CSS minification, template string parsing with value interpolation, and keyframe name validation with reserved keyword checks.

## src/helper/proxy/index.ts
- Main exports or names: `proxy`
- Reads as: TypeScript Fetch API wrapper for proxying requests
- Neighbor files: src/http-exception, src/utils/headers
- Safe summary: Wraps fetch for proxying with hop-by-hop header filtering and optional strict RFC 9110 Connection header processing to prevent header injection attacks.

## src/helper/dev/index.ts
- Main exports or names: `inspectRoutes`, `showRoutes`, `getRouterName`
- Reads as: TypeScript console output utilities for route debugging
- Neighbor files: src/hono, src/types, src/utils/color, src/utils/handler
- Safe summary: Provides route inspection utilities that list registered routes with methods and handler names, with optional colorization and verbose mode for middleware listing.

## src/helper/html/index.ts
- Main exports or names: `html`, `raw`
- Reads as: TypeScript template string utility for HTML generation
- Neighbor files: src/utils/html
- Safe summary: Template literal function for generating HTML with automatic escaping and callback support for dynamic content, returning HtmlEscapedString or Promise<HtmlEscapedString>.

## src/helper/ssg/index.ts
- Main exports or names: `toSSG`, `ssgParams`, `disableSSG`, `onlySSG`, `ssgParams`, `redirectPlugin`
- Reads as: TypeScript SSG (Static Site Generation) helper exports
- Neighbor files: src/ssg/ssg, src/ssg/middleware, src/ssg/utils, src/ssg/plugins
- Safe summary: Main export file re-exporting SSG utilities including static generation core functions, middleware for SSG params, and plugins for before/after hooks.

## src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts
- Main exports or names: `toSSG`, `fetchRoutesContent`, `saveContentToFile`, `defaultPlugin`
- Reads as: TypeScript SSG implementation with concurrent file generation
- Neighbor files: src/client/utils, src/hono, src/types, src/utils/concurrent, src/utils/mime, src/ssg/middleware, src/ssg/utils
- Safe summary: Core SSG logic that fetches route content via concurrent parallel requests, handles dynamic routes with parameters, determines file paths and extensions, and saves to filesystem using FileSystemModule interface.

## src/helper/ssg/utils.ts
- Main exports or names: `dirname`, `joinPaths`, `isDynamicRoute`, `ensureWithinOutDir`
- Reads as: TypeScript path utility functions for SSG
- Neighbor files: src/ssg/ssg
- Safe summary: Path manipulation utilities including directory name extraction, path joining with OS-compatible handling, dynamic route detection for parameterized paths, and path traversal prevention.

## src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts
- Main exports or names: `ssgParams`, `isSSGContext`, `disableSSG`, `onlySSG`
- Reads as: TypeScript middleware functions for SSG context control
- Neighbor files: src/ssg/ssg, src/ssg/utils
- Safe summary: Middleware utilities for SSG context including `ssgParams` for setting parameters on dynamic routes, `disableSSG` to skip static generation, and `onlySSG` to respond only in SSG context.

## src/helper/streaming/index.ts
- Main exports or names: `stream`, `streamSSE`, `streamText`
- Reads as: TypeScript streaming helper exports
- Neighbor files: src/helper/streaming/stream, src/helper/streaming/sse, src/helper/streaming/text
- Safe summary: Re-exports streaming functions: `stream` for generic streaming, `streamSSE` for Server-Sent Events, and `streamText` for plain text streaming with appropriate headers.

## src/helper/streaming/stream.ts
- Main exports or names: `stream`
- Reads as: TypeScript generic stream response creator
- Neighbor files: src/context, src/utils/stream, src/helper/streaming
- Safe summary: Creates streaming responses with TransformStream, handles errors via optional callback, and manages context lifecycle including abort signal handling for old Bun versions.

## src/helper/streaming/sse.ts
- Main exports or names: `streamSSE`, `SSEStreamingApi`, `SSEMessage`
- Reads as: TypeScript SSE (Server-Sent Events) streaming implementation
- Neighbor files: src/context, src/utils/html, src/utils/stream, src/helper/streaming
- Safe summary: Implements SSE streaming with proper headers (Transfer-Encoding: chunked, Content-Type: text/event-stream), message formatting with data/events/ids/retry fields, and error message reporting via SSE channel.

## src/helper/streaming/text.ts
- Main exports or names: `streamText`
- Reads as: TypeScript plain text streaming response creator
- Neighbor files: src/context, src/utils/stream, src/helper/streaming/stream
- Safe summary: Wraps base stream function with Content-Type: text/plain header and X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff security header to prevent MIME type sniffing.

## src/helper/accepts/index.ts
- Main exports or names: `accepts`
- Reads as: TypeScript export file for accepts helper
- Neighbor files: src/helper/accepts/accepts
- Safe summary: Single export file that re-exports the `accepts` function from accepts.ts for accept header parsing.

## src/helper/accepts/accepts.ts
- Main exports or names: `accepts`, `Accept`, `acceptsConfig`, `acceptsOptions`, `defaultMatch`, `parseAccept`
- Reads as: TypeScript function for parsing accept headers
- Neighbor files: src/context, src/utils/accept, src/utils/headers
- Safe summary: Parses Accept headers to find best matching content type or language with quality value sorting, supports custom match functions, and returns default when no match found.

## src/helper/conninfo/index.ts
- Main exports or names: `GetConnInfo`, `ConnInfo`, `NetAddrInfo`, `AddressType`
- Reads as: TypeScript export file for connection info types
- Neighbor files: src/helper/conninfo/types
- Safe summary: Type definitions export file that re-exports `ConnInfo`, `GetConnInfo`, `NetAddrInfo`, and `AddressType` from types.ts.

## src/helper/conninfo/types.ts
- Main exports or names: `ConnInfo`, `GetConnInfo`, `NetAddrInfo`, `AddressType`
- Reads as: TypeScript interface definitions for connection information
- Neighbor files: src/helper/conninfo/index
- Safe summary: Defines types for connection info including remote address with optional transport protocol (tcp/udp), port number, address type (IPv4/IPv6), and host name information.

## Simple Index

- [src/helper/factory/index.ts](src/helper/factory/index.ts)
- [src/helper/route/index.ts](src/helper/route/index.ts)
- [src/helper/websocket/index.ts](src/helper/websocket/index.ts)

- [src/helper/css/common.ts](src/helper/css/common.ts)
- [src/helper/proxy/index.ts](src/helper/proxy/index.ts)
- [src/helper/dev/index.ts](src/helper/dev/index.ts)
- [src/helper/html/index.ts](src/helper/html/index.ts)
- [src/helper/ssg/index.ts](src/helper/ssg/index.ts)
- [src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts](src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts)
- [src/helper/ssg/utils.ts](src/helper/ssg/utils.ts)
- [src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts](src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts)
- [src/helper/streaming/index.ts](src/helper/streaming/index.ts)
- [src/helper/streaming/stream.ts](src/helper/streaming/stream.ts)
